title: Block Previewer: Reforged
description: Client-side mod to preview how blocks will be orientated when placed!
body:
# Block Previewer: Reforged
Block Previewer: Reforged is an unofficial Forge port for [Block Previewer 2.0.0](https://modrinth.com/mod/blocks-previewer), please support the original work.

This is a purely client-sided mod, and does not interact the server. Works similarly to Create’s placement preview, but for any block in Minecraft.

### Preview blocks before placing!
![2](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ray22777/blockspreviewer/refs/heads/master/showcase1.webp)

## Required dependency
[Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config/version/11.1.136+forge)

## Configuration
![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ab92ec3fa24c64ad849d7ed465a538a479191acb.png)
